# Huamei — Premium Custom Luxury Packaging

> Custom rigid boxes, magnetic closures, hot-foil stamping, embossing, deboss, spot-UV, soft-touch lamination, and paper engineering. Four factories across Henan, Zhejiang, Sichuan, and Guizhou. Founded 1992 by Sonia Sun.

> 22,000 m² of paper and ink. Ninety-nine structures, seventeen foils, eighty papers on file. Three thousand-plus craftspeople. MOQ public floor: 200+ pieces. Sample turnaround: 7–10 days. Production: 15–20 days.

## Sustainability & international supply chain

- Over 80% of factory energy from solar — green-energy use across the press floors.
- Shareholder portfolio includes long-term investment in biomass renewable-energy and hydro generation.
- Transit-grade quality testing on every export run: high-temperature 50 °C and low-temperature -30 °C environmental, 24-hour transit vibration, drop, aging, and empty-box compression.
- International certifications on file: BSCI, CE, EQS, FSC, SGS — covering quality, environmental, and social-responsibility audits expected by EU and US procurement.
- Magnetic-closure pull-force calibrated 6–50 g at 2,800 Gauss; hot-foil-to-emboss registration held to ±0.1 mm; offset Pantone tolerance ΔE ≤ 2 (Heidelberg + KBA presses).

## Capabilities — structures

- [Rigid & telescoping boxes](https://huamei.io/craft/rigid) — the house standard, two-piece lift-off, 1.5–3.0 mm greyboard core.
- [Magnetic closures](https://huamei.io/craft/magnetic) — hidden neodymium, soft-latch reveal; pull-force 6–50 g at 2,800 Gauss.
- [Drawer & slipcase](https://huamei.io/craft/drawer) — single, twin, and tower formats; paperboard runners only.
- [Folding cartons](https://huamei.io/craft/folding) — 250–450 gsm SBS; reverse-tuck, auto-bottom, seal-end, bespoke crashes.
- [Book-style & clamshell](https://huamei.io/craft/book) — cloth-bound spines; Iris, Wibalin, Buckram on file.
- [Inserts & cradles](https://huamei.io/craft/inserts) — EVA, moulded pulp, cut-flute, satin; ±1 mm tolerance to product.
- [Shoppers & carriers](https://huamei.io/craft/shoppers) — 200 gsm gusseted; rope, ribbon, knotted cord, leather handles.
- [Bespoke one-offs](https://huamei.io/craft/bespoke) — engineered structures from 100 units; named on the colophon.

## Capabilities — surfaces & finishing

- [Hot-foil stamping](https://huamei.io/craft/hot-foil) — 17 in-house foils across warm metallics (5), cool metallics (4), pigmented (4), holographic / pearlescent (2), specialty (2).
- [Registered emboss](https://huamei.io/craft/emboss) — magnesium dies for short runs, copper for long; ±0.1 mm to ink/foil.
- [Debossing](https://huamei.io/craft/deboss) — blind or foil-filled; best on uncoated and book-cloth.
- [Soft-touch lamination](https://huamei.io/craft/soft-touch) — velvet matte film; scratch- and fingerprint-resistant.
- [Spot UV & varnish](https://huamei.io/craft/spot-uv) — gloss-on-matte; registered to ink and emboss at ±0.2 mm.
- [Offset & Pantone print](https://huamei.io/craft/offset) — 8-colour Heidelberg XL 106 / KBA; ISO 12647-2 colour-managed to ΔE ≤ 2.
- [Wrap papers & cloth](https://huamei.io/craft/wraps) — Gmund, Fedrigoni, Iris and Wibalin book-cloth, plus 80+ wrap stocks on file.

## Industries served

- [Cosmetic & skincare](https://huamei.io/industry/cosmetic) — folding, rigid, magnetic-flap construction for skincare brands.
- [Wine, spirits, tea](https://huamei.io/industry/spirits) — book-style, drawer, ceramic-and-cradle for premium baijiu, wine, and tea houses.
- [Seasonal & gifting](https://huamei.io/industry/seasonal) — Chinese New Year, Mid-Autumn, lunar limited editions, ribbon shoppers.
- [Wellness](https://huamei.io/industry/wellness) — uncoated stocks, soy ink, pulp inserts.

## Named clients on file

Wuliangye, Yangshao, Luoyang Dukang, Hongxing / Red Star Erguotou, Hetao Wang, Shede, Danquan, Zhonghua, Taozui, Tian An Men Jiu, T2 True Brews, DEEPURE Heritage Tea, Collgene, Kefumei, Yue-Sai, Glees Grove, Man Made Crayon, Serenjoy Box LLC (US).

## About

- [Philosophy](https://huamei.io/house/philosophy) — a letter from founder Sonia Sun.
- [Factory & floor](https://huamei.io/house/factory) — four press floors across Henan, Zhejiang, Sichuan, Guizhou.
- [Certifications](https://huamei.io/house/certifications) — FSC, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, BSCI, CE, EQS, SGS, and 5 additional cert scans on file.
- [People](https://huamei.io/house/people) — named press and finishing operators.
- [Imprint](https://huamei.io/imprint) — registered Zhengzhou, Henan, China; corporate registration scan on file.

## Case studies

- [All published volumes](https://huamei.io/volumes) — selected projects across cosmetic, skincare, spirits, gifting, wellness; named-client and DTC work.

## Editorial

- [Blogs](https://huamei.io/blogs) — the Huamei journal of luxury packaging. Pillars on rigid-box manufacturing, hot-foil stamping, working with a Chinese manufacturer.

## Begin a project

- [Project intake](https://huamei.io/begin) — MOQ public floor 200+ pieces. 7–10 day samples. 15–20 day production. Founder-led reply within 48 hours.
